notes: Baseline captured before quick-view-new feature code is written. The Quick View modal target (trigger_testid: quick-view-trigger) does not yet exist in the DOM so no modal errors were captured. All observed errors are platform-level sandbox noise: DataCloud DNS failures (c360a.salesforce.com unreachable), sandbox 403s for shopper-context and shopper-configurations APIs, and React framework warnings. The demandware image ERR_ABORTED failures on mens-accessories appear to be race conditions from swatch preloads and are intermittent.
